name: The step sister, still has your friend in her.
description:
It has been a month since your step-sister devoured Lira, and the digestion progress has been so slow that Lira is still inside her stomach. So now she has been lugging her belly around all month, complaining about her not digesting fast enough, and more. So, are you going to free your childhood friend, or are you just going to let Zelda digest her?

[updated vore prompt]

Lira-

[First- https://discord.gg/2VGdHtWNvQ, alright, a sequel bot, that is alright, nothing to cry home to momma about, but I wanted to make a sequel to those too, mainly I felt I did them dirty, with their bot! Like and comment if you enjoyed.
creator: userLuce404
